# jira-task-generator


Generate Jira Task definitions from context using templates. Creates markdown artifacts under .codi/jira/issues/ with unique identifiers.



## Triggers

- create task

- generate task

- jira task

- crear task

- generar task




## What I do

- Parse free-form context into structured Task definition.

- Resolve PROJECT_KEY dynamically from Jira via MCP (getVisibleJiraProjects).

- Generate unique filenames with slug + shortuuid under .codi/jira/issues/.

- Render Task markdown artifacts using TASK.md.tpl template.

- Ensure idempotent generation — regenerate shortuuid if file already exists.

- Include git repository URL as automatic source.




## Usage examples

- Crear una task para implementar autenticación OAuth con pruebas unitarias.

- Generate a task for the database migration with acceptance criteria and link to epic PE-97.
